name: Ubiquiti UniFi 5G Max Outdoor
title: Ubiquiti UniFi 5G Max Outdoor
title_extended: Ubiquiti UniFi 5G Max Outdoor – Outdoor 5G Modem with Dual SIM, 2.5GbE, IP67
short_description: Outdoor 5G modem for UniFi consoles and Cloud Gateways. Supports 5G NR, 4G LTE, 3G. Dual SIM (Nano-SIM and eSIM). Rugged IP67 enclosure. 2.5 GbE port, PoE powered. UniFi integrated.
description: The UniFi 5G Max Outdoor is a powerful outdoor 5G modem designed to provide fast and reliable mobile internet for UniFi consoles and Cloud Gateways. It supports modern 5G NR networks with peak download speeds of up to 3.4 Gbps, while also remaining fully compatible with 4G LTE and 3G networks. Support for dual SIM, including Nano-SIM and eSIM, enables automatic failover between mobile operators to maintain a stable connection in case of network issues. The device works especially well in locations where fiber is not available or where mobile connectivity is required as a primary or backup link.

detailed_description.heading: High-Speed 5G Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The UniFi 5G Max Outdoor is a powerful outdoor 5G modem designed to provide fast and reliable mobile internet for UniFi consoles and Cloud Gateways. It supports modern 5G NR networks with peak download speeds of up to 3.4 Gbps, while also remaining fully compatible with 4G LTE and 3G networks. This makes it suitable for a wide range of regions and mobile operators worldwide. Support for dual SIM, including Nano-SIM and eSIM, enables automatic failover between mobile operators to maintain a stable connection in case of network issues. The device works especially well in locations where fiber is not available or where mobile connectivity is required as a primary or backup link. With support for advanced radio technologies and high transmission power, it delivers stable performance even in areas with weaker signal conditions.

detailed_description.heading: Rugged Outdoor Enclosure
detailed_description.text: UniFi 5G Max Outdoor is built to operate reliably in demanding outdoor environments. Its enclosure combines aluminum alloy with UV-stabilized polycarbonate, providing strong protection against weather, sunlight, and mechanical stress. The device is rated IPX6 by default and can reach IP67 protection when used with the optional cable-gland door kit, making it suitable for rain, snow, dust, and humidity. Flexible mounting options allow installation on walls or poles, with all required mounting accessories included in the package. The sturdy construction is engineered to withstand strong winds of up to 200 km/h, ensuring safe deployment on rooftops, towers, or open outdoor structures.

detailed_description.heading: Seamless UniFi Integration & Easy Management
detailed_description.text: The UniFi 5G Max Outdoor is designed to work with UniFi Cloud Gateways and UniFi consoles as an external 5G modem. It connects via Ethernet and provides a high-speed mobile WAN uplink for UniFi networks. The device does not function as a standalone router, but instead complements existing UniFi infrastructure by delivering primary or backup internet connectivity. A single 2.5 GbE Ethernet port provides fast connectivity to gateways or switches, ensuring the cellular connection does not become a bottleneck. Power over Ethernet (PoE) further simplifies deployment and maintenance. The device uses high-power radio technology to improve uplink performance, which is especially useful in locations with challenging network conditions.
